final_text:
{
  "deployment_strategy": "Blue-green deployment",
  "infrastructure_components": [
    "AWS EC2 instances for microservices",
    "AWS RDS for MongoDB",
    "AWS S3 for static assets",
    "AWS Route 53 for DNS routing",
    "AWS CloudFront for CDN"
  ],
  "environment_requirements": [
    "AWS account",
    "EC2 instances with Node.js and MongoDB installed",
    "S3 bucket for static assets",
    "Route 53 domain",
    "CloudFront distribution"
  ],
  "ci_cd_requirements": [
    "Jenkins for CI/CD pipeline",
    "GitHub repository for source code",
    "Docker for containerization",
    "Kubernetes for orchestration"
  ],
  "release_steps": [
    "Build Docker images for microservices",
    "Push Docker images to Docker Hub",
    "Update Kubernetes deployment configurations",
    "Rollout new deployment using Jenkins pipeline"
  ],
  "rollback_steps": [
    "Revert to previous Kubernetes deployment configuration",
    "Rollback Docker images to previous version",
    "Monitor system for any issues after rollback"
  ],
  "monitoring_requirements": [
    "AWS CloudWatch for logging and monitoring",
    "New Relic for application performance monitoring",
    "Datadog for infrastructure monitoring"
  ],
  "deployment_notes": [
    "Ensure all microservices are running before deploying new version",
    "Monitor system closely after deployment for any issues",
    "Communicate deployment schedule to stakeholders"
  ]
}
